Never use inline styles or internal <script> tags.

Always modularize code: Logic goes in .js, styles in .css, and markup in .html.

Reuse existing components in the /components folder; do not rewrite them. Think like a senior developer or architect when designing new components or features.

Comment your code to explain the "why" and the "what" for humans to understand and maintain the codebase. Avoid comments that only restate the code.

Refactor code when necessary to improve reusability, SEO optimization and maintainability. Create the necesary subfolders to organize the codebase.

When certain things are not clear, ask before proceeding. It's better to clarify and get options than to make assumptions and potentially cause regressions or missunderstndings.
